CVE-2024-25189.title: libjwt 1.15.3 uses strcmp (which is not constant time) to verify  ...
CVE-2024-25189.summary: libjwt 1.15.3 uses strcmp (which is not constant time) to verify authentication, which makes it easier to bypass authentication via a timing side channel.
